narrative:
Precinct Rootstown F (precinct in Portage County) has 917 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
